name: anki-mcp-bridge
description: Connect Claude Desktop to the anki-mcp-addon server running inside Anki.
long_description: Bridges Claude Desktop to the anki-mcp-addon MCP server, which runs inside Anki itself (install separately via AnkiWeb code 593632040, or from https://github.com/luiz-santos-it/anki-mcp-addon). Anki must be open with the add-on installed for this extension to work.

server_url.title: Anki MCP Server URL
server_url.description: The SSE URL the anki-mcp-addon server listens on inside Anki. Change this if you changed the port in the add-on's settings dialog.
